title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DB Schenker India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DB Schenker India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
